calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard
Trent J. Thornley, Esq. for Petitioner: Mauricio Suarez, present as Guardian ad litem for and with: Cindy Suarez, a minor Claimant.
Ms. Cindy suarez is also serve as Spanish Interpreter for the Petitioner.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
No fees or costs to the minor.
The total proceeds of $38,150.00 to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit attached to the Order.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Off Calendar
